messages.content: paraphrase this: So sorry, we're not handling this Sharepoint server.
My apologies, we're not managing this Sharepoint server.
paraphrase this: Please advise if we have to contact Beside IT or do we need to close this ticket?
Could you inform us whether we need to reach out to Beside IT, or should we proceed to close this ticket?
paraphrase this: Could you please provide photo of the error on Canon printer?
Would you mind supplying a picture of the error displayed on the Canon printer?
paraphrase this: Is there 'return to work' form to be filled-out when came back from vacation (ex Philippines)?
Is there a 'return to work' form that needs to be completed upon returning from vacation, for example, from the Philippines?
paraphrase this: We're just checking from higher management about this and let you know as soon as possible.
We are currently seeking clarification from senior management on this matter and will inform you at the earliest opportunity.
paraphrase respectfully: I kindly request to be updated on the status of the ticket.
I would appreciate it if you could kindly provide me with an update on the ticket status.
paraphrase this: Printer has been installed to Ahmed's personal laptop. For IP phone, please create separate ticket for this.
The printer has been set up on Ahmed's personal laptop. Regarding the IP phone, kindly open a separate ticket.
paraphrase this: Please go to 'Exit-Reentry Request', enter the date , then click 'Display'. Please check if you have pending request on the same date? So we will know how many ERE you have applied?

Navigate to 'Exit-Reentry Request', input the date, and then select 'Display'. Can you verify if there is an existing request for the same date? This will help us determine the number of Exit-Reentry Requests (EREs) you have submitted.

paraphrase this: Thank you for the information. Laptop is now connected to Milestone Internet (see Summit). However, please raise another request for IP phone as all IT tasks must be on separate ticket, not on same ticket.

Thank you for providing the details. The laptop has successfully connected to Milestone Internet (reference: Summit). However, for the IP phone, kindly submit a new request since all IT-related tasks require individual tickets rather than being combined in a single ticket.
paraphrase this: Canyou click one of the ERE and see if there is option to 'withdraw', 'cancel' or 'delete'? If there is, do it and re-apply again for new ERE.
Could you please select an ERE and check if there are options to 'withdraw', 'cancel', or 'delete' it? If such options are available, proceed to remove it and then apply anew for a new ERE.
paraphrase this: We will check the system and get back to you.
We will review the system and respond to you shortly.
paraphrase this respectfully: We will check the system and get back to you.
We will conduct a review of the system and revert to you with an update promptly.
paraphrase this: Please create INC in Service Desk and attach the screenshot of error so that we have reference of this issue.
Kindly open an INC ticket in the Service Desk and attach a screenshot of the error for us to have a reference point for this problem.
